about enabling a facility for online fu: about enabling a facility for online fulfillment.
A pickup group is the set of facilities: A pickup group is the set of facilities that can fulfill store pickup orders for this product store. Create one, or use a group that already exists.
A store repesents a company or a unique: A store repesents a company or a unique catalog of products. If your OMS is connected to multiple eCommerce stores sellling different collections of products, you may have multiple Product Stores set up in HotWax Commerce.
Add an inventory rule to define which fa: Add an inventory rule to define which facilities can fulfill orders for this batch, and in what order.
Adjust your search to find facilities to: Adjust your search to find facilities to add.
All facilities enabled for online fulfil: All facilities enabled for online fulfillment will be attempted for brokering if no filter is applied.
All orders in all parkings will be attem: All orders in all parkings will be attempted if no filter is applied.
An inventory channel maps a set of facil: An inventory channel maps a set of facilities to a sales channel so their stock can be published together. Create one, or use a channel that already exists.
Any change made on this page will be los: Any change made on this page will be lost. You will not be able to reverse this action.

Safety stock reserves a buffer of invent: Safety stock reserves a buffer of inventory per facility or group so it is not promised to online orders.
Safety stock should be greater than or e: Safety stock should be greater than or equal to 0.

Shipping rules control which facilities: Shipping rules control which facilities can ship online orders, based on product and facility or product and channel combinations.
Skipping will run this job at the next o: Skipping will run this job at the next occurrence based on the temporal expression.

Store pickup rules decide which faciliti: Store pickup rules decide which facilities can fulfill in-store pickup orders, based on product and facility or product and channel combinations.
Test drive your brokering run to see how: Test drive your brokering run to see how specific orders are routed. Try different kind of orders to quickly verify if all flows are working as expected.
Testing an order also allocates it to in: Testing an order also allocates it to inventory in the OMS. Make sure to reset tested orders before trying another order or exiting test mode.

This will hide the group from rule selec: This will hide the group from rule selectors. The group's data is preserved server-side.
Threshold rules hold back a portion of i: Threshold rules hold back a portion of inventory so you do not oversell online. Create your first rule to get started.
Threshold should be greater than or equa: Threshold should be greater than or equal to 0.

Unlimited capacity removes the fulfillme: Unlimited capacity removes the fulfillment capacity limit entirely. To add a fulfillment capacity to this facility, use the custom option.
